title: The Two-Wheeler Commute
scenario: You commute daily on a two-wheeler. A ₹10 lakh personal accident cover costs very little per month. Worth it, or an unnecessary expense?

choices.label: Skip it — I'm a careful rider
choices.lesson: Accidents don't ask how careful you are. An income-earner losing the ability to work is exactly the risk personal accident cover is built for.

choices.label: Add a ₹10L personal accident cover
choices.lesson: Personal accident cover is cheap because it's pure protection. For a young earner with a risky commute, it plugs a real gap.
